steps.title: Solve for t
steps.content: Divide by $-3$: $t+6=-15$, then subtract $6$: $t=-21$. The answer is -21.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $-21$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $-21$.
